brand.name: CN111 Studio
lang.label: Language
v1.section.placeholderBody: This is a V1 information architecture skeleton. Content will be filled in future iterations.
v1.home.hero.title: A productized studio for Growth × AI
v1.home.hero.lede: We combine growth strategy and AI engineering to help teams validate, ship, and scale faster.
v1.home.entrySection.title: Choose an entry
v1.home.entry.growth.title: B · Growth
v1.home.entry.growth.body: For growth outcomes: strategy breakdown, experiment design, data loops, and execution.
v1.home.entry.ai.title: C · AI
v1.home.entry.ai.body: For AI delivery: evaluation, engineering, delivery, and continuous improvement.
v1.solutions.title: Solutions
v1.solutions.lede: Growth track: a set of solution packages around goals, channels, experiments, and iteration (skeleton placeholder).
v1.services.title: Services
v1.services.lede: AI track: capabilities from evaluation to production delivery (skeleton placeholder).
v1.caseStudies.title: Case Studies
v1.caseStudies.lede: Showcase selected projects with context, approach, and outcomes (skeleton placeholder).
v1.resources.title: Resources
v1.resources.lede: Articles, templates, and tools to reuse playbooks and delivery assets (skeleton placeholder).
v1.about.title: About
v1.about.lede: Who we are, how we work, and what we value (skeleton placeholder).
v1.book.title: Book a call
v1.book.lede: Share your context, schedule a call, and align on next steps (skeleton placeholder).
mobile.menu.title: Menu
mobile.viewMode.title: View Mode (dev)
mobile.home.title: CN111.NET · Mobile Home
mobile.home.lede: Concise info, fast entry points, and readability first—designed for browsing key event content on small screens.
mobile.home.highlights.1.title: Keynotes + Workshops
mobile.home.highlights.1.body: Practice-driven sessions: case studies, toolchains, and hands-on labs.
mobile.home.highlights.2.title: Networking & Hiring
mobile.home.highlights.2.body: Meet speakers and peers in person—and connect with recruiters in the expo area.
mobile.home.benefits.1: Curated tracks: engineering, product, design, growth
mobile.home.benefits.2: Post-event pack: slides, recordings, and extended reading
mobile.home.benefits.3: On-site support: volunteers, guidance, and refreshment points
mobile.home.help.1.title: Contact us
mobile.home.help.1.body: For ticketing, partnerships, or venue questions, leave a message on the Contact page.
mobile.tickets.title: Tickets · Mobile Purchase
mobile.tickets.lede: A ticketing entry optimized for small screens: browse ticket types, review benefits and rules, then complete your order.
mobile.tickets.overview.1.title: Standard Pass
mobile.tickets.overview.1.body: Ideal for first-time attendees: main hall seat, post-event pack, and expo access.
mobile.tickets.overview.2.title: VIP Pass
mobile.tickets.overview.2.body: Better seating and fast track, plus speaker meetups/dinner and other perks (subject to on-site announcements).
mobile.tickets.notice.1: Use your common email/phone so you can receive e-tickets and updates.
mobile.tickets.notice.2: Invoice/corporate billing info can be left on the Contact page—we'll assist manually.
mobile.tickets.notice.3: For rescheduling/refunds, refer to the final event policy.
mobile.news.title: News · Mobile Updates
mobile.news.lede: Shorter summaries and card lists for quick browsing—scan the titles, catch the key points, then open the full article.
mobile.news.latest.1.title: Agenda update: 2 new workshops
mobile.news.latest.1.body: Hands-on sessions for engineering practice and AI toolchains—limited seats available; book early.
mobile.news.latest.2.title: Attendee guide: transport & check-in
mobile.news.latest.2.body: Arrive off-peak if possible. Mobile view prioritizes check-in, maps, and key notes.
mobile.news.concern.1: How do I access the post-event pack? (Usually sent to your ticket email.)
mobile.news.concern.2: Do you support group/corporate purchases? (Leave a message on Contact.)
mobile.news.concern.3: Where is the sponsor/partner entry? (See Contact.)
mobile.contact.title: Contact · Mobile
mobile.contact.lede: Ticketing, sponsorship, media, or other questions—this page provides the right entry points. Mobile view focuses on how to reach us and common FAQs.
mobile.contact.entries.1.title: Tickets / Invoice / Group purchase
mobile.contact.entries.1.body: In your message, include: company/name, headcount, ticket type, whether corporate billing is needed, and invoice details.
mobile.contact.entries.2.title: Sponsorship / Partnership
mobile.contact.entries.2.body: Briefly describe the collaboration type and budget range—we'll reply soon and share the sponsor kit.
mobile.contact.prepare.1: Background + expected outcome (e.g. corporate invoice, sponsor tier, media registration)
mobile.contact.prepare.3: If related to an order: include the purchase email or order number (redacted)
mobile.indexSlider.title: Index Slider · Mobile
mobile.indexSlider.lede: This template emphasizes “image carousel + key information”. On mobile, we present the essentials in a tighter layout.
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.1.title: Conclusion first
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.1.body: Keep primary CTAs above the fold; use short highlight bullets to complement the carousel.
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.2.title: Avoid long paragraphs
mobile.indexSlider.strategy.2.body: Split information into cards or lists—keep each item within ~2 lines for comfortable scrolling.
mobile.indexSlider.highlights.3: All day: Expo, networking, sponsor activities
mobile.indexCountdown.title: Index Countdown · Mobile
mobile.indexCountdown.lede: The countdown layout creates urgency as the event approaches. On mobile we compress it into progress cues + a clear action.
mobile.indexCountdown.what.1.title: Key milestones
mobile.indexCountdown.what.1.body: Start time / check-in deadline / early-bird end (sample).
mobile.indexCountdown.what.2.title: Act now
mobile.indexCountdown.what.2.body: Keep “tickets/support” on the same screen to reduce friction and hesitation.
mobile.indexCountdown.checklist.1: Confirm ticket and entry info (QR code/email)
mobile.indexCountdown.checklist.2: Plan transport and accommodation (ideally 1–2 weeks ahead)
mobile.indexCountdown.checklist.3: Prepare questions: what do you want to discuss with speakers?
mobile.indexSliderText.title: Index Slider Text · Mobile
mobile.indexSliderText.lede: When copy density is higher, mobile works better with segmented cards: clear titles and short bullets.
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.1.title: One-line value proposition
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.1.body: Put the key benefit in the first sentence, then add evidence/data or scenario context.
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.2.title: Three key selling points
mobile.indexSliderText.structure.2.body: Each point within ~8–12 words—easy to scan while scrolling.
mobile.indexSliderText.topics.1: Building an AI product metrics system from 0→1
mobile.indexSliderText.topics.2: Engineering evaluation, monitoring, and gradual rollout
mobile.indexStaticBg.title: Index Static Background · Mobile
mobile.indexStaticBg.lede: A static background is best for stable info (time/location/theme). On mobile, content is organized as cards.
mobile.indexStaticBg.core.1.title: Date
mobile.indexStaticBg.core.2.title: Venue
mobile.indexStaticBg.core.3.title: Theme
mobile.indexStaticBg.audience.1: People who want to quickly grasp trends and practical methods
mobile.indexStaticBg.audience.2: People looking to build connections and partnership opportunities
mobile.indexStaticBg.audience.3: People interested in the intersection of product, engineering, and design
mobile.tickets2.title: Tickets 2 · Mobile
mobile.tickets2.lede: More granular ticket/package examples—compare benefits and pick the best fit.
mobile.tickets2.packages.1.title: Team package (3–5 people)
mobile.tickets2.packages.1.body: Great for small teams: bundled registration, unified invoicing, and guided check-in.
mobile.tickets2.packages.2.title: Workshop add-on
mobile.tickets2.packages.2.body: Add hands-on seats beyond the main track—ideal if you want to leave with tangible outcomes.
mobile.tickets2.tips.1: By content: main track only → Standard; networking/deep access → VIP.
mobile.tickets2.tips.2: By group: traveling together → Team; solo upskilling → Workshop add-on.
mobile.tickets2.tips.3: By timing: earlier purchase helps secure preferred sessions and seating areas.
mobile.newsSingle.title: News Single · Mobile
mobile.newsSingle.lede: Single articles prioritize bullets + cards: less layout overhead, faster to read and revisit on phones.
mobile.newsSingle.points.1: Agenda and speakers are continuously updated—bookmark the page or subscribe to notifications.
mobile.newsSingle.points.2: Mobile view prioritizes “next actions”: tickets, directions, contact.
mobile.newsSingle.points.3: For corporate invoicing/group/media, leave a message on Contact.
mobile.newsSingle.links.1.title: Tickets
mobile.newsSingle.links.1.body: Browse ticket types and benefits to choose your attendance option.
mobile.newsSingle.links.2.title: Contact
mobile.newsSingle.links.2.body: Partnerships, sponsorship, media registration, and on-site support.
